g.text: ▲ rsp moves down 40 bytes per call
Call Sequence: factorial(5) → factorial(4) → factorial(3) → factorial(2) → factorial(1) → return 1
JIT frames use identical layout to C!

div.p: push rbp mov rbp, rsp push rbx sub rsp, 8
push rbp mov rbp, rsp push rbx sub rsp, 8

g.text: • return_addr: Where to resume after ret
• n: Function argument in callee-saved reg
mov rbp, rsp ; establish new frame
mov rbx, rdi ; rbx = n (arg in rdi)
